---
name: "\U0001F310 Platform Support Request"
about: Request support for a new AI platform
title: "[Platform] Add support for "
labels: platform-request
assignees: ''
---

## Platform Details

- **Platform Name**: (e.g., Mistral Le Chat)
- **URL**: (e.g., https://chat.mistral.ai)
- **Type**: Chat / Code assistant / Search / Other

## Current Behavior

What happens when you try to use ContextFlow on this platform?

- [ ] Capture button doesn't appear
- [ ] Capture button appears but captures nothing / garbage
- [ ] Inject doesn't work (text not inserted)
- [ ] Other: ___

## DOM Info (Optional — Helps a Lot!)

If you're comfortable with browser DevTools, right-click a user message and an AI response, then "Inspect Element":

- **User message selector**: (e.g., `<div class="user-msg">`)
- **AI response selector**: (e.g., `<div class="bot-response">`)
- **Conversation container**: (e.g., `<main id="chat-area">`)

## Screenshots

A screenshot of the platform's chat UI would help contributors build the extractor.
